creator: graudeejs@yandex.com
text:
FreeBSD port states that devel/liblcfg is released under BSD license.
Project home page also states the same.

However I checked project source files, and all source files have GPLv2 license comment

For example:
http://src.carnivore.it/liblcfg/tree/code/src/lcfg_parser.c
